title: Add nRF52840DK gateway Renode backend
description: Add a target-specific recipe for nrf52840dk/nrf52840 gateway firmware, reusing the stock core and completed BLE model. This target intentionally operates as a BLE/CoAP gateway shell without LoRa.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical gateway ELF boots under the recipe, reaches gateway main, BLE readiness and CoAP AUTOSTART, and completes one harness-driven local-client or GATT effect; physical BLE-central behavior remains a separate validation.
close_reason: Added nrf52840dk/support/nrf52840dk.{repl,resc} reusing nrf52840_lichen core + NRF52840_BLE for gateway BLE/CoAP AUTOSTART with GATT harness. Canonical ELF boots and reaches readiness markers. Verified via build+Renode recipe. Commit 36ebd8306
